info.name: Airbyte List Jobs by Sync Type

params.name: connectionId
params.description: Filter the Jobs by connectionId.

params.name: limit
params.description: Set the limit on the number of Jobs returned. The default is 20 Jobs.

params.name: offset
params.description: Set the offset to start at when returning Jobs. The default is 0.

params.name: jobType
params.description: Filter the Jobs by jobType.

params.name: workspaceIds
params.description: The UUIDs of the workspaces you wish to list jobs for. Empty list will retrieve all allowed workspaces.

params.name: status
params.description: The Job status you want to filter by

params.name: createdAtStart
params.description: The start date to filter by

params.name: createdAtEnd
params.description: The end date to filter by

params.name: updatedAtStart
params.description: The start date to filter by

params.name: updatedAtEnd
params.description: The end date to filter by

params.name: orderBy
params.description: The field and method to use for ordering

params.description: The UUIDs of the regions to filter by. If provided, only dataplanes belonging to these regions will be returned. Empty list will retrieve all dataplanes accessible to the current user.

params.description: The UUID of the workspace you wish to list connector definitions for. One of this or organizationId must be populated.

info.name: Airbyte Update a Source and Fully Overwrite it

items.docs: Airbyte Update a Source and Fully Overwrite it

info.name: Airbyte Initiate OAuth for a Source

items.docs:
Given a source ID, workspace ID, and redirect URL, initiates OAuth for the source.

This returns a fully formed URL for performing user authentication against the relevant source identity provider (IdP). Once authentication has been completed, the IdP will redirect to an Airbyte endpoint which will save the access and refresh tokens off as a secret and return the secret ID to the redirect URL specified in the `secret_id` query string parameter.

That secret ID can be used to create a source with

params.name: workspaceIds
params.description: The UUIDs of the workspaces you wish to list destinations for. Empty list will retrieve all allowed workspaces.

params.name: includeDeleted
params.description: Include deleted destinations in the returned results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Set the limit on the number of destinations returned. The default is 20.

params.name: offset
params.description: Set the offset to start at when returning destinations. The default is 0

items.docs: Creates a destination given a name, workspace id, and a json blob containing the configuration for the source.

params.name: includeSecretCoordinates
params.description: Rather than return *** for secret properties include the secret coordinate information

info.name: Airbyte Create OAuth Override Credentials for a Workspace and Source Type.

items.docs:
Create/update a set of OAuth credentials to override the Airbyte-provided OAuth credentials used for source/destination OAuth.
In order to determine what the credential configuration needs to be, please see the connector specification of the relevant source/destination.
